subcodes.first_line: God willing, from time immemorial and unto evermore, the sealed wine hath been and shall ever be opened by the Finger of the Beloved's loving-kindness [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: انشاء الله لم یزل و لایزال از رحیق مختوم که باصبع عنایت محبوب مفتوح گشته
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @praise and encouragement, @consolation and comfort
